§6Fish & Seafood§f

§aCatch, cook, and prepare fish and ocean creatures.§f

HarvestCraft adds §e25+ fish species§f. Raw fish restores §e1 hunger, 0.6§f saturation. Cook in a furnace for §e2 hunger, 1.2§f saturation. Use the §bWater Trap§f for passive fishing.

§6Raw Fish§f: Anchovy, Bass, Carp, Catfish, Charr, Clam, Crab, Crayfish, Eel, Frog, Grouper, Herring, Jellyfish, Mudfish, Octopus, Oyster, Perch, Scallop, Shrimp, Snail, Snapper, Tilapia, Trout, Tuna, Turtle, Walleye, Sardine, Mussel.

§6Cooked§f: Clam, Crab, Crayfish, Frog Legs, Octopus, Oyster, Scallop, Shrimp, Snail, Turtle, Mussel.

Fish can be used in §bFish Sandwich§f, §bFish Taco§f, §bSushi§f, and more.

§6Fish Processing§f:
§b• Grinder§f: Grind any raw fish into §bGround Fish§f (used in fish cakes, fish sticks, fish and chips).
§b• Smelting§f: Cook raw fish in a furnace for §e2× hunger§f restoration.
§b• Water Trap§f: Passively catch fish using Fish Trap Bait (§e1 fish per 2.5 minutes§f).

§eTip§f: Set up a row of §bWater Traps§f in an ocean biome for passive fish income. Feed the fish into a §bGrinder§f for §bGround Fish§f used in many meal recipes.
